Matter called, ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling:

Defendants' motion for summary judgment or in the alternative summary adjudication is denied in its entirety. Defendants' notice of motion does not comply with Cal. R. Ct. 3.1350(b). In any event, there are triable issues of material fact regarding whether each of the defendants breached his or her duty of care and caused plaintiff injury.
